author.bio: Builder of open internets by day, player of DJ musics by night. I don't tweet much since the US elections, but I still lurk a lot 😊
author.name: Jessica Schilling

content.text: The new IPFS Docs beta is live! 🎉🎉 It’s fully redesigned with search, reorganized content, and more. https://docs-beta.ipfs.io/ #ipfs #dweb #documentation
